project.name: gogomail
project.description: High-performance Go mail server — SMTP/IMAP/CalDAV/CardDAV — targeting national-scale deployments

exceptions.description: Before creating apps/shell, apps/webmail, apps/admin, or shared UI packages

rules.description: Production code changes (internal/*.go excl _test.go, migrations/*.sql) require at least one docs/ file staged

task_structure.description: Agent reads ACTIVE_TASK.md only. After commit, advances to next backlog item.

loop_policy.description: Loop is perpetual. Stopping without a listed halt_condition is a harness violation.

scope_enforcement.deviation_policy: forbidden — implement only what ACTIVE_TASK.md directs
scope_enforcement.self_selection_policy: next task must come from NEXT_STEPS.md backlog only
scope_enforcement.backlog_empty_action: derive next item from backend-roadmap.md phases and append to NEXT_STEPS.md, then continue loop
scope_enforcement.out_of_roadmap_action: forbidden — do not implement features absent from backend-roadmap.md

steps: read docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md — confirm task and acceptance criteria
update docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md, docs/backend-roadmap.md, openapi.yaml as needed
update docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md acceptance checklist to fully checked
git add (code + tests + docs), git commit
git push origin main (only if go test ./... passes)
advance docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md to next backlog item from docs/NEXT_STEPS.md
IMMEDIATELY return to step 1 — do not wait for user input
blocked_by: ambiguous-acceptance-criteria — record blocker in ACTIVE_TASK.md and wait

commit_rules.co_author: must not add AI co-author lines unless user requests

domain_rules.protocol_product_separation: enforced — no spam/product logic in SMTP core
domain_rules.library_over_adhoc: use well-maintained libraries for protocol parsing, no ad-hoc string parsing

change_history.change: initial bootstrap — test-gated push, strict pre-commit hook, ACTIVE_TASK.md single-task pattern, Korean communication
strengthen loop — add loop_policy (infinite, forbidden halt conditions), scope_enforcement (roadmap-bound), explicit step-10 no-wait-for-user, update PROJECT_HARNESS.md/CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md

roadmap update — add Phase 2 (Runtime Config Store: PostgreSQL JSONB+LISTEN/NOTIFY), Phase 3 (Enterprise Identity: LDAP/SCIM/SAML/OIDC), Phase 4 (Drive WebDAV), Phase 5 (Milter/DNSBL), Phase 6 (POP3), Phase 7 (Push/Delta Sync), Module×RFC compliance map
